articles.title: Intel "Nova Lake-S" Coming in 2027, CES Launch Alongside AMD "Olympic Ridge" Likely - TechPowerUp
articles.description: It was revealed in a recent leak that the next-gen AMD Zen 6 Ryzen CPUs would be delayed until 2027, and it has now emerged, that the upcoming Intel "Nova Lake-S" Core Ultra Series 4 CPUs may be joining AMD for an early 2027 launch, when previous reports plac…
articles.content: john_I am talking about the marketing of cores being cores, no matter if they are performance cores that have full feature set and cache and clock up to over 5.x GHz, or if they are low powered cores… [+3650 chars]
